overview: BY8 Launch Tool is a premium multi-chain crypto analytics and token launch platform with real-time visibility tracking, engagement insights, and a full token launch flow for any blockchain.
features: Multi-chain contract address lookup (Solana, Ethereum, Base, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum, Avalanche)
Full token launch form with tokenomics, fee estimation, and platform selector
Premium cyberpunk dark UI with frosted glass, neon accents, and 60fps spring animations
Real-time dashboard with visibility score, engagement metrics, and activity feed
Whale verification with read-only wallet connect and 7M+ token holder check
Community page with live activity feed and recently tracked tokens
Export reports as PDF/CSV or shareable links
Achievement badges with haptic and sound celebrations
